audio/voice/male_narrator_intro_candidat.prompt: At seven fifty-five, the campus has already started without you. The alarm is not angry. It is simply keeping records.

audio/voice/male_narrator_caught_candida.prompt: You caught the little red circle. That is either progress or a very small administrative error.

audio/voice/male_narrator_bargain_candid.prompt: I can explain the missing record. I can also leave. Those are both excellent plans.

audio/voice/male_narrator_library_candid.prompt: The library keeps every receipt. It does not promise that the receipts will be helpful.

audio/voice/male_narrator_022_candidate_.prompt: Seat zero two two is occupied by a bag, a note, and an argument with the rules.

audio/voice/male_narrator_bike_candidate.prompt: The shortcut is wet, crowded, and technically a bad idea. You have already selected it.

audio/voice/female_system_found_candidat.prompt: A new signal has been found. Please do not call it a miracle before checking the timestamp.

audio/voice/female_system_inventory_cand.prompt: The route is available. Your evidence is not. Please locate the evidence before selecting the route.

audio/voice/female_system_move_candidate.prompt: Manual movement is almost ready. One more ordinary action remains.

audio/voice/female_system_library_candid.prompt: The library has accepted the entry record. Seat zero two two has not accepted anything.

audio/voice/female_system_evidence_candi.prompt: The proof is readable now. Upload only what the page can identify.

audio/voice/female_system_recovery_candi.prompt: The request is complete. The account can return when the evidence is complete.
